title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Mydekk Limited
body: "Application number 5076  Applicant Mydek Limited objected to the name used by Mydekk Limited under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 25 February 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Mydekk Limited is changed to 15597216, LTD. "
